notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter grounds into a double play, second baseman Josh Smith to shortstop Corey Seager to first baseman Jake Burger. Riley Greene out at 2nd. Kerry Carpenter out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Danny Jansen GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Danny Jansen grounds into a double play, third baseman Colt Keith to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Ezequiel Duran to 3rd. Josh Smith out at 2nd. Danny Jansen out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Danny Jansen rally-killer GIDP
